tools.versionPolicy: Use official Agave/Solana release archives only after release engineering pins version and checksum.
tools.officialSourceNote: Official Agave/Solana release artifacts only. The app must not run installer scripts.
tools.notes: System Solana CLI can be detected. Managed install is blocked until an official artifact URL and sha256 are pinned.
tools.licenseNote: Package according to the upstream Agave/Solana license.

tools.versionPolicy: Install AVM from the official Anchor repository using a fixed Cargo command when Cargo is already available.
tools.officialSourceNote: Official Anchor repository: https://github.com/coral-xyz/anchor. Cargo install is a tooling install risk and requires explicit approval.
tools.rustToolchainPinningNote: If current Rust cannot compile Anchor, use RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN with a fixed candidate for the AVM install command only.
tools.notes: No archive download is enabled. If Cargo is present, GORKH can prepare fixed AVM install commands for explicit approval.
tools.licenseNote: Package according to upstream Anchor license terms.

tools.versionPolicy: Pinned sample/smoke version. Anchor is installed through AVM when available.
tools.officialSourceNote: Official Anchor install path through AVM. Verify anchor --version after install.
tools.rustToolchainPinningNote: Do not mutate the global Rust default. Use RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=1.79.0 only for fixed AVM/Cargo commands when explicitly approved.
tools.notes: Anchor managed install is driven by AVM, not an unverified archive. If AVM/Cargo are missing, localnet Anchor smoke skips safely.
tools.licenseNote: Package according to upstream Anchor license terms.

tools.versionPolicy: Detect system Rust/Cargo. Managed Rust packaging requires verified official dist artifacts.
tools.officialSourceNote: Official Rust distribution only. No rustup shell bootstrap is allowed inside the app.
tools.rustToolchainPinningNote: Rust 1.94 failed the D4 Anchor 0.30.1 AVM install path. D5 fixed candidate is 1.79.0 via rustup, with no global default mutation.
tools.notes: Rust is detected from trusted paths in D3. Managed Rust install remains blocked pending a verified archive strategy.
tools.licenseNote: Package according to upstream Rust license terms.

tools.versionPolicy: Detect system Cargo. Cargo can prepare AVM install only with explicit tooling approval.
tools.officialSourceNote: Cargo is resolved from trusted paths or a future verified Rust package.
tools.rustToolchainPinningNote: cargo +1.79.0 --version is a fixed probe; approved AVM install commands may use RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=1.79.0.
tools.notes: Cargo is detected from trusted paths. It is not bootstrapped by GORKH.
tools.licenseNote: Package according to upstream Rust license terms.

tools.versionPolicy: Detect system Node. Managed Node packaging requires official archive plus sha256.
tools.notes: Managed Node install is blocked until release engineering pins an official archive and checksum.
tools.licenseNote: Package according to upstream Node.js license terms.

tools.officialSourceNote: npm is resolved from the Node distribution or trusted system paths.
tools.notes: npm is detected only. GORKH does not run project npm scripts automatically.
tools.licenseNote: Package according to upstream npm license terms.

tools.versionPolicy: Use validated system Git in D3.
tools.officialSourceNote: Use system Git or package according to official Git release guidance in a future phase.
tools.notes: D3 prefers validated system Git and does not package managed Git by default.
tools.licenseNote: Use system Git or package according to upstream Git license terms.
